labels.description: The intent labels to classify into (e.g. return_item, cancel_subscription, get_information).

output_key.description: State field the chosen label is written to - a Router downstream branches on it.

x-ui.effect: Write EVERY applicable label (a list) instead of exactly one - pair with a Router set to 'multi' so a question with several intents fans out to every matching branch in parallel.

instructions.description: Optional extra guidance for the classification (domain hints, tie-breaking rules).

$comment: ports: in:text, out:text. Routing pattern: classifier -> router(expression=output_key, cases per label). multi_label writes list[str].
